etymology.description: 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + 壬(壬) (rén, "ninth heavenly stem") = mouth speaking slowly
etymology.interpretation: The character 㕯 combines the element 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") with 壬(壬) (rén, "ninth heavenly stem"), suggesting speech that is considered slow or deliberate. The use of these components signifies the control and modulation of speech.
